chapter_title.en: To Abu Musa Ashaari, the governor of Kufa, when Ali learned that he discouraged jihad

text: وَاللهِ إِنَّهُ لَحَقٌّ مَعَ مُحِقٍّ، وَمَا أُبَالِي مَا صَنَعَ الْمُلْحِدُونَ، وَالسَّلَامُ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: By Allāh, this is the case of right with the rightful person and we do not care what the heretics do; and that is an end to the matter.
